title: Better Colors - Saturation & Vibrancy
description: Completely overhauls and strongly improves the game's colors and saturation
body:
**REVIVE YOUR GAME AGAIN** 

This pack boosts and adjusts minecraft's color saturation, tone, vibrancy and hue while keeping a balance

 

Thanks to this pack you'll be able to enjoy a more colorful and vibrant balanced Minecraft experience. 

 

More vibrant and colorful in every biome/dimension
Blocks appear more natural and vivid
Colored mobs also have a slight color boost 
And much more...
 

The resourcepack aims to add a slight color tone/saturation difference to most of blocks, biomes,mobs... making it noticeable and enjoyable without any oversaturation present in other color boosting packs that only aim to boost saturation, on the other hand this pack also adjust colors' tone, temperature and vibrancy while increasing saturation slightly, if needed for the specific block/mob 

 

 

 

This pack is compatible with most of shaders and mods and should work even if paired with some other pack aswell
